findings.evidence: `rg` shows the inherited assumption at line 50; lines 77-121 prove these lemmas from only `hF0`, `hFcont`, or `hbound`, with no use of addition, negation, or `IsSemigroupGroupPD`.
findings.fix: Move the pointwise/continuity/bound lemmas to a separate section with `{V : Type*} [Zero V]` (and `[TopologicalSpace V]` where needed), keeping `[AddCommGroup V]` only for lemmas whose statement mentions `IsSemigroupGroupPD`.
findings.issue: The global `variable {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V]` makes `normalize_apply_of_map_zero_eq_one`, `normalize_continuous`, and both `norm_normalize_apply_le_one...` lemmas require an additive commutative group even though their statements/proofs use only the origin `(0, 0)` and pointwise complex algebra.

summary: The previous positive-definiteness over-assumption on the bound lemma is fixed, but several purely pointwise normalization lemmas still inherit an unused group structure on `V`. Split the section so only the actual `IsSemigroupGroupPD` statements require `[AddCommGroup V]`.
